title: liampas' Qol modpack
description: Mods to make Minecraft more enjoyable by optimizing it and adding simple features.
body:
This modpack aims at optimizing the game and adding simple features that benefit the player's quality of life. Most of optifine's features are integrated. If you want the game to be optimized without too many mods, this is it!

# Features
- optimizations
- Customizable zoom
- easy LAN to the public
- shaders
- WorldEdit
- fullbright
- litematica
- connected textures
- Customizable player and entity models

# Mods
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/e0M1UDsY) [8\.13]
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/1IjD5062) [3\.0\.1\-beta\.1\+1\.21\.11]
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) [3\.11\.4]
